meaning: n.(谈话,写作等的)题目,主题,学生的作文,作文题,[音乐] 主题,主题曲,主旋律
examples: Race is a recurrent theme in the work.
The speaker was now warming to her theme.
A slow theme introduces the first movement.
The theme continues out into the garden where Kywon Datham is working the grill.
's The Awkward Stages, and it's obvious the pop band weaves an overarching theme through each track.
